title: crocus angustifolius
intro: Crocus angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved crocus or autumn crocus, is a perennial plant belonging to the iris family (Iridaceae) and is native to southern Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Crocus angustifolius include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
